tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]F#m7[/ch]
  You're better than the best[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
  I'm lucky just to linger in your light[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]            [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Cooler than the flip side of my pillow, that's right[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]
  Completely unaware[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                                [ch]B[/ch]    
  Nothing can compare to where you send me,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]F#m7[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Lets me know that it's ok, yeah it's ok[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]F#m7[/ch]
And the moments where my good times start to fade[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
You make me smile like the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]               [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
Fall out of bed, sing like a bird[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Dizzy in my head, spin like a record[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Crazy on a Sunday night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
You make me dance like a fool[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]    
Forget how to breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
Shine like gold, buzz like a bee[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
Just the thought of you can drive me wild[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Ohh, you make me smile[/tab]

[ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
  Even when you're gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]
  Somehow you come along[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Just like a flower poking through the sidewalk crack and just like that[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
You steal away the rain and just like that[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
You make me smile like the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]               [ch]Amaj9[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
Just the thought of you can drive me wild[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Ohh, you make me smile[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]C#m/B[/ch]
Don't know how I lived without you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#/A#[/ch]
Cause every time that I get around you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]C#m/B[/ch]              [ch]F#/A#[/ch]
I see the best of me inside your eyes[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E/A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
You make me smile[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
You make me dance like a fool[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]
Forget how to breathe[/tab]

Shine like gold, buzz like a bee[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]F#m7[/ch]               [ch]E/A[/ch]
Just the thought of you can drive me wild[/tab]
